subcodes.first_line: In this day must the loved ones of God act in accordance with that which hath been sent down from the heaven of His everlasting Command. Blessed is he who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم باید دوستان الهی بانچه از سماء امر لایزالی نازل شده عامل شوند طوبی لمن
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
